_comment: Wire ABI for sandbox::* error codes. Pinned by sandbox_error_codes_integration.rs (Rust) and consumed by SDK contract tests in Node + Python. Adding a new SandboxError variant requires adding a row here. Changing a `code` is a breaking SDK change.

codes.summary: request payload failed validation (e.g. missing/malformed sandbox_id)
sandbox uuid not found in registry
another exec is in flight on this sandbox; await before firing another
sandbox already stopped; create a new one
image not in catalog or allowlist
rootfs missing on disk; run iii worker add
auto-install pull/extract failed; retry
exec exceeded timeout_ms
fs op rejected by supervisor as invalid
path does not exist
path is wrong type (file vs dir)
path already exists
directory is not empty
permission denied
generic fs I/O failure
invalid regex/pattern in grep or sed
fs streaming channel aborted mid-flight; retry
fs op unsupported by this supervisor; upgrade iii-worker
VM boot or supervisor session failure
resource limit exceeded (cpu/memory/concurrency cap)
